response:
Here is a goodbye email to coworkers:

Dear Team,

I wanted to let everyone know that my last day is approaching and I will be leaving [Company Name] on [Date]. I have truly enjoyed my time working with all of you and appreciate the support and opportunities I've had during my tenure. I am grateful for the experience and knowledge gained while working here. I will miss working alongside such a talented and dedicated team. I wish the company continued success in the future.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
